markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 4
### Chapter 69. Jefferson & Orange Cnty. Pilots Licensing and Regul. Act
##### § 69.019 — Open Meetings Law

Chapter 551 (Open Meetings) , Government Code, applies to actions and proceedings under this chapter.

*Added by Acts 2003, 78th Leg., ch. 745, Sec. 1, eff. June 20, 2003.*

subsections.text: Chapter 551 (Open Meetings) , Government Code, applies to actions and proceedings under this chapter.

history.raw: Added by Acts 2003, 78th Leg., ch. 745, Sec. 1, eff. June 20, 2003.
